name: SDLC Review Team
description: Full SDLC phase gate review team covering security, testing, requirements, and documentation

responsibilities: Security gate validation for phase transition
Test strategy alignment with phase objectives

use_cases: Phase gate validation (Inception → Elaboration → Construction → Transition)

handoffs.gate: All requirements have corresponding test cases; no gaps identified
All security requirements are traceable to use cases
All test results documented; coverage thresholds met

overlap_resolution.documentation_review: technical-writer handles docs quality; requirements-analyst handles requirements completeness
overlap_resolution.security_requirements: security-architect owns threat model; requirements-analyst owns traceability
